pattern: Grid validation checking that each column is uniform and adjacent columns differ everywhere.
hints: Two separate conditions must hold: vertically all cells in a column must match, horizontally adjacent columns must differ at every row.
For the column-uniformity check, compare each cell to the one directly below it. For the horizontal check, compare each cell to its right neighbor.
A single pass over all (i,j) pairs suffices: check grid[i][j] == grid[i+1][j] when i+1 exists, and grid[i][j] != grid[i][j+1] when j+1 exists.

edge_inputs.description: single row grid with distinct adjacent values
single row grid with repeated adjacent value - invalid
single column grid with different values - invalid
single column grid with same values - valid
top rows agree but bottom row breaks column uniformity
columns uniform but first two columns are equal in some row - invalid

stress.description: random m x n grids with values 0-9
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    m = rng.randint(1, size)
    n = rng.randint(1, size)
    grid = [[rng.randint(0, 9) for _ in range(n)] for _ in range(m)]
    return [grid]
